MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Leonard Grayver, Esq. (310.372.5770; leonard@grayverlaw.com) of Grayver Law Group PC for Plaintiff.
Thomas Carlson, Esq. (415.956.2828; tcarlson@rjo.com) of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DECKROBOT, INC.'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions is GRANTED. Complaint against Defendant Deckrobot, Inc. is dismissed. No sanctions.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and findings and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Off Calendar May-05-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Leonard Grayver, Esq. (310.372.5770; leonard@grayverlaw.com) for Plaintiff.
Thomas Carlson, Esq. (415.365.5305; tcarlson@rjo.com) of Rogers Joseph O'Donnell for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DECKROBOT, INC.'s Motion Compelling Further Responses To Interrogatories is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Request for sanctions is DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff's request to report defendant's counsel to State Bar is DENIED.

Mr. Carlson to submit a proposed order repeating vebatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312 via email to williamclynn@gmail.com.

The Court will also review the Stipulated Protective Order Regarding Confidentiall Information submitted by parties on March 22, 2022 when a courtesy copy is provided.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
